title: Sweet Creamy Indulgent Turkish Udon Stir-fry
description: A sweet and creamy indulgent twist on traditional Turkish udon noodles with a touch of sweetness that complements the dish's rich texture.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add Udon Noodles and cook for about 8 minutes or until al dente.
Drain the noodles and set aside. Keep hot.
In a separate bowl, whisk together almond milk, honey/maple syrup, vanilla extract, ginger powder, and turmeric powder. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Warm up the almond milk mixture in a small saucepan over medium heat until it starts to simmer lightly.
Add finely chopped red bell pepper (if using) to the warm almond milk mixture and stir gently to incorporate evenly.
Gently fold in the cooked Udon Noodles, ensuring they are well-coated with the almond milk mixture. Adjust sweetness as needed.
Transfer to serving plates immediately to maintain a creamy texture and mild heat. Garnish with finely chopped green onions if desired.
Serve hot or at room temperature.
